_doc: A-01 Agent Card contract — field path (dotted) -> expected value, asserted against the raw JSON served at /.well-known/agent.json. Grounded in the actual main-plan-agent card. Per A2A 1.0 the legacy top-level url/preferredTransport are deprecated (validated as 'absent' in A-02.E) and the per-interface endpoint supportedInterfaces[0].url is checked on shape (suffix /a2a) in A-01.D, so neither is pinned here.
name: main-plan-agent
